start.title: Door Beneath the Drift
start.text: Half-hidden beneath a mound of snow is a heavy wooden door built directly into the hillside.

open.title: Dark Interior
open.text: The hinges groan loudly as the door opens inward into darkness. A stale draft spills from below.

leave.title: Some Things Stay Closed
leave.text: You decide against disturbing whatever lies beneath the hill.
